name: omnidock
description: Open-source Cloudflare email dashboard for Workers, Email Routing, Email Sending, D1, R2, support inboxes, Gmail sync, contacts, signatures, logs, and R2 file management.

scripts.build: node tools/prepare-deploy-config.mjs && node tools/validate-deploy-config.mjs && npm run types && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.deploy:with-migrations: npm run build && npm run db:migrate:remote && node tools/deploy-preserving-bindings.mjs

DB.description: Required D1 database. Keep the generated `database_id` in installed copies so updates reuse the same database.

MAIL_BUCKET.description: Required R2 bucket for raw messages and attachments. Keep the generated bucket name in installed copies so updates reuse the same bucket.

AI.description: Workers AI binding used by Index Engine for document-to-markdown and OCR-style text extraction.
